_doc: Frozen semi-synthetic injected bank on REAL Lee2019 features (pre-reg v4). Real covariate/noise/subject structure + INJECTED known truth restores ground truth so false-confirmation AND power are measurable. DRY-RUN package only: definitions are frozen; NO bank is generated or run here. Each condition is regenerable from the seed schedule.

disjoint_from.realeeg_dev_probes: none (feasibility builder is deterministic, used no RNG seeds)

seed_schedule.disjointness_note: realeeg_base_seed 20000000 > 14100047 (B3 max) so all real-EEG seeds are disjoint from every synthetic and dev seed stream; the dry-run runner asserts this.

engine_provenance.note: the injection + verdict ENGINE is hash-pinned here (defense-in-depth beyond the git tag); the runner verifies it in dry_run AND execute (P1.2 audit H1). The runner is not self-pinned (it is the checker; it is protected by the git-frozen tag). v2 re-pin: engine now also contains the performance-only parallel executor (run_validation_parallel + task table + checkpoint/assembly); the serial run_validation reference is byte-unchanged and used by the serial==parallel identity tests.

execution_provenance.successor_of: csc-realeeg-v1 (serial; infrastructure-infeasible: ~6.3 days serial > 5-day cpu-high wall, end-only write -> killed with no artifact)

task_count_breakdown.label_note: 'multi-cohort' is NOT a synonym for 'injected': of the 8 multi-cohort conditions, 7 inject synthetic labels; NULL_real_session keeps REAL labels with a stratified pseudo-condition split. The genuine contrast keeps REAL labels and is DESCRIPTIVE only (1 cohort over all eligible subjects). So the honest count is 8 multi-cohort conditions x 100 + 1 genuine = 801 (NOT 9 x 100).

execution_provenance.task_model: each of the 801 (condition x cohort_index) tasks is a PURE deterministic function of (condition, seed, cache); rng=default_rng(seed) is created fresh per cohort and never carries state across cohorts, so parallelism cannot change any per-cohort record
execution_provenance.canonical_sort: records are re-sorted by (condition_index, cohort_index) == serial order BEFORE evaluate_verdict, because the cohort bootstrap resamples the fired-flag ARRAY whose order must match serial for byte-identity
execution_provenance.fail_closed: missing / duplicate / worker-errored task -> InfraError -> runner exit 2, NO endpoint evaluated (never a silent skip); a partial/checkpoint is progress evidence, NOT a scientific result
execution_provenance.checkpointing: each cohort streamed to <out>.partial.jsonl; periodic <out>.checkpoint.json; resume allowed ONLY when checkpoint task_table_sha256 + git_head + cache/bank/engine hashes all still match
execution_provenance.note: PERFORMANCE + artifact-safety change only. The verdict path (evaluate_verdict), the 4 gating controls, TIER1/2/3 definitions, and every statistic are byte-unchanged from v1. Numerical identity is proven by the serial==parallel identity tests on a smoke subset.

pooled_boundary_note: P_hat(Y|Z) 'pooled' means a single logistic fit on BOTH sessions jointly, applied IDENTICALLY to both sessions to draw Y*. It is a GENERATIVE fit (in-sample; NOT a subject-grouped cross-fit): the null P(Y*|Z) is condition-independent BY CONSTRUCTION (same boundary for both sessions), so type-I is not inflated regardless of cross-fitting. (P1.2 audit M1: corrected from an earlier 'cross-fit/no-leakage' wording.)

aggregation.gating_null_false_confirm: over R cohorts per GATING condition, cohort bootstrap upper bound on the false-confirmation rate <= family 0.05 (per-cohort decision at alpha_budget 0.025); denominator = VALID cohorts; invalid/abstain fraction reported separately, capped at 0.20 -> INCONCLUSIVE above cap
aggregation.power_reported: over R cohorts on POS_concept / POS_concept_plus_cov: confirmation rate + cohort bootstrap lower bound (REPORTED, non-gating)
aggregation.genuine_contrast: ONE run over all eligible subjects; verdict + per-subject delta distribution (DESCRIPTIVE only)

output_tiers: TIER 1 -- B3 real-feature SAFETY verdict (GATING false-confirm controls: NULL_cov [primary], NULL_label, NULL_cov_plus_label, random_label_control)
TIER 2 -- B3 real-feature POWER report (POS_concept, POS_concept_plus_cov; REPORTED, not gating)
TIER 3 -- Route A real-MI TRIAL-LABEL diagnostic (false-confirm / abstention / power behavior; transfer evidence for the A-negative story; NOT a revalidation of the subject-label synthetic A)

conditions.name: NULL_real_session
conditions.input_sessions: within a single real session, split trials into two pseudo-conditions
conditions.split: stratified random (preserve L/R balance; random assignment, not contiguous)
conditions.held_fixed: P(Z) identical across pseudo-conditions (no covariate shift); P(Y|Z) identical
conditions.role: CALIBRATION check of the null machinery on real Z

conditions.name: NULL_cov
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs session 2 (real cross-session covariate drift)
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ P_hat(Y|Z) from a SINGLE generative pooled boundary fit on both sessions, applied identically to both (see pooled_boundary_note)
conditions.injected_shift: the REAL cross-session covariate drift is present; NO concept shift
conditions.role: PRIMARY type-I null under real covariate drift (the deployment failure mode)

conditions.name: NULL_label
conditions.label_model: shift P(Y) across conditions with P(Z|Y) held fixed (class-conditional resampling of real trials)
conditions.held_fixed: P(Z|Y); only the class prior P(Y) differs across conditions
conditions.ground_truth: NO_CONCEPT (label-shift trap; must abstain / not confirm)

conditions.name: NULL_cov_plus_label
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs 2 (real covariate) + prior shift
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ pooled P_hat(Y|Z), then class-conditional prior shift across conditions
conditions.held_fixed: P(Y|Z) boundary; covariate and prior both move

conditions.name: POS_concept
conditions.label_model: Y* ~ pooled P_hat(Y|Z) in condition -1/2; in condition +1/2 apply an ANTISYMMETRIC boundary rotation of pre-registered magnitude before drawing Y*
conditions.held_fixed: marginal P(Z) (real); only the decision boundary rotates with condition

conditions.name: POS_concept_plus_cov
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs 2 (real covariate) + injected rotation
conditions.labels: SYNTHETIC (Y* with rotation on real covariate drift)
conditions.label_model: as POS_concept but on top of the real cross-session covariate drift

conditions.name: POS_pure_conditional
conditions.label_model: relabel so P(Y|Z) changes while the marginal P(Z) is held fixed (no marginal trace)
conditions.injected_shift: pure-conditional concept shift (Z-only unidentifiable by Prop.1)
conditions.role: SECONDARY reported (weak-by-theory; B3 target, A must abstain)

conditions.name: random_label_control
conditions.role: GATING sanity null: fully-random labels have no P(Y|Z) structure; any concept confirmation here is a calibration failure and must FAIL the package

conditions.name: genuine_session_contrast_descriptive
conditions.input_sessions: real session 1 vs session 2, REAL labels
conditions.role: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (report the verdict + subject-Delta distribution; NEVER gates PASS/FAIL; a CONCEPT_CONFIRMED here is not validated truth)

gating_summary.note: random_label_control is a GATING sanity null (NO_CONCEPT): random labels must not produce concept confirmation, else calibration failure -> package FAIL.
